item.description: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump says he won't 'rush into' deal to end war with Iran
media:content.media:description: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

item.title: Trump says he won't 'rush into' deal to end war with Iran

item.description: Crews have been working through the weekend to cool a chemical tank and stop it from exploding in Southern California as they worked to avert a disastrous “worst-case” scenario, the incident’s commander said. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

media:content.media:title: California crews race to avoid toxic chemical tank explosion
media:content.media:description: Crews have been working through the weekend to cool a chemical tank and stop it from exploding in Southern California as they worked to avert a disastrous “worst-case” scenario, the incident’s commander said. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

item.title: California crews race to avoid toxic chemical tank explosion

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The viral, AI-generated video opens with the iconic Hollywood sign on fire and features Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass wearing makeup to look like the Joker.

media:content.media:text: Spencer Pratt, Los Angeles mayor Karen Bass and Nithya Raman.
media:content.media:description: Spencer Pratt; Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass; Nithya Raman.

item.title: Reality check: Spencer Pratt seeks to convert online attention to real-life votes in L.A.

item.description: The U.S. Secret Service says officers shot and killed a person who opened fire at a security checkpoint on Saturday. Five senior law enforcement officials say the suspect had a history of mental health concerns. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

media:content.media:title: Secret Service kills man who opened fire at White House security checkpoint
media:content.media:description: The U.S. Secret Service says officers shot and killed a person who opened fire at a security checkpoint on Saturday. Five senior law enforcement officials say the suspect had a history of mental health concerns. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

item.title: Secret Service kills man who opened fire at White House security checkpoint

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
item.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

media:content.media:text: Two hands reach out, in the style of "The Creation of Adam," against a blue sky. A glowing green computer chip hovers between the fingers.

item.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:credit: Amazon; Kara Birnbaum / NBC News; Brooklinen
media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

item.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Steve Patterson
Shanshan Dong
item.description: A potential crack may be releasing pressure inside a toxic chemical tank in Garden Grove, officials said Sunday, a development they hope could help avert a devastating vapor explosion.

media:content.media:text: Steam and mist rising off of industrial tanks.
media:content.media:description: An aerial of water being sprayed on large storage tanks at the GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove, Calif. May 24, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A drone photo of an industrial yard surrounded by train tracks.
media:content.media:description: A spokesperson said Sunday the company is monitoring the condition of the “affected material” and crews are working “around the clock to mitigate the risk of a leak.”

media:content.media:text: Two red fire trucks parked in the middle of a street.
media:content.media:description: Officials are concerned the tank at GKN Aerospace could rupture and release toxic material into waterways and vapors into the air.

media:content.media:text: An eight lane highway devoid of any traffic in California, seen from the air.
media:content.media:description: Empty streets in Garden Grove, Calif., on Sunday. Shelters in Orange County are filling up with frantic locals as 50,000 people are under evacuation orders.

media:content.media:text: People stand in a line in a gymnasium.
media:content.media:description: Evacuees at a temporary shelter in Garden Grove on Friday.

item.title: Potential crack on California chemical tank may ease pressure as crews race to prevent explosion

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: Buckle up: The Mercedes intra-team battle for the Formula 1 drivers’ world championship just kicked into high gear

media:content.media:text: Kimi Antonelli pumps a fist into the air while wearing a race helmet.
media:content.media:description: Race winner Kimi Antonelli of Italy celebrates following the F1 Grand Prix of Canada in Montreal on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Two cars on a racetrack outside
media:content.media:description: Race winner Kimi Antonelli of Italy celebrates following the F1 Grand Prix of Canada in Montreal on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: A blurred photo of a race car passing on the track.
media:content.media:description: Race winner Kimi Antonelli of Italy celebrates following the F1 Grand Prix of Canada in Montreal on Sunday.

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins fourth Formula 1 race in a row after George Russell’s car issues

item.dc:creator: Amina Kilpatrick
Mark Hodge
Kayla Hayempour
item.description: President Donald Trump said he won’t “rush into a deal” to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.”

media:content.media:text: Iran War
media:content.media:description: A man waves an Iranian flag under a billboard depicting the Strait of Hormuz and President Donald Trump in Tehran on May 6, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Yellow Crime scene tape stretches across the frame in front of police officers.
media:content.media:description: Secret Service police place evidence markers Saturday after an exchange of gunfire near the White House.

media:content.media:text: A promotional image for the newly formed Cockroach Janta Party.
media:content.media:description: A promotional image for the newly formed Cockroach Janta Party.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Ugandan health teams screen travelers for Ebola on Saturday as precautions have been stepped on the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Nollaig O'Connor
Doha Madani
item.description: A woman paragliding over the Austrian Alps survived a horrifying midair collision after a small plane flew through her glider, sending her spiraling out of control thousands of feet in the air

media:content.media:text: Drone shot, view of village with parish church, Piesendorf, Pinzgau, Salzburg province, Austria, Europe
media:content.media:description: A view of Piesendorf, Pinzgau, Salzburg province, Austria.

item.title: ‘Can’t believe I’m sitting here’: Paraglider escapes death after plane rips through glider

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Venezuelan Nobel Peace Prize laureate María Corina Machado announced she plans to run for president again and intends to return to her home country before the end of 2026.

media:content.media:text: Maria Corina Machado
media:content.media:description: Venezuelan politician María Corina Machado.

item.title: María Corina Machado vows another run for Venezuelan presidency and eyes return from exile

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years, which killed at least 82 people.

media:content.media:text: Rescue workers walk outside near an ambulance at the site of a coal mine explosion
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers at the Liushenyu coal mine in Qinyuan County, China, on Saturday after an explosion.

item.title: Authorities investigate safety lapses after China coal mine blast kills at least 82

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Bella LoBue
item.description: At least 19 people were injured in a stampede at an annual motorcycle rally Sunday morning in Atlantic Beach, according to local officials.

media:content.media:text: A firetruck parked outside at night
media:content.media:description: Horry County Fire Rescue crews were dispatched to the stage area near South Ocean Boulevard in Atlantic Beach for a reported stampede incident in Atlantic Beach, S.C., on May 24, 2026.

item.title: At least 19 injured in South Carolina stampede at annual motorcycle rally

item.dc:creator: Tavleen Tarrant
Larissa Gao
item.description: Most of the hundreds of “LabGerm” videos posted and reposted to social media in recent weeks start out the same way: A pair of gloved hands appears against a white backdrop as an AI-generated voice narrates, and upbeat music plays in the background.

media:content.media:text: Illustration of a common pleco fish on phone screens.
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on social media show small animals being physically maimed.

media:content.media:text: A screenshot of a TikTok video showing two Pleco fish inside of a small water container, with a caption that reads "Removing the plecos heart brain liver and lungs one by one"
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on social media show small animals being physically maimed.

media:content.media:text: two gloved hands hold on to the fins of two different colored pleco fish, one black, left, and one orange
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on social media show small animals being physically maimed.

item.title: How bizarre fish ‘experiment’ videos from China hijacked the internet’s worst impulses

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Cristian Mungiu’s Norway-set drama about political polarization, “Fjord,” has won the Palme d’Or, handing the Cannes Film Festival ’s top honor for the second time to Mungiu, the Romanian director of “4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days.”At a 79th Cannes Film Festival that saw few films cause a stir, “Fjord” found wide admiration for its engrossing tale of what Mungiu called “left-wing fundamentalism.”

media:content.media:text: From left, Tilda Swinton, Renate Reinsve, Cristian Mungiu, and Sebastian Stan pose together for a photo as Cristian holds the Palme d'Or prize trophy
media:content.media:description: Tilda Swinton; Renate Reinsve; Cristian Mungiu, winner of Palme d'Or for "Fjord"; and Sebastian Stan during the closing ceremony of the Cannes Film Festival on Saturday.

item.title: Norway-set drama about political polarization ‘Fjord’ wins Palme d’Or at Cannes

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Cristian Santana
item.description: Five Chicago police officers were hit by a car early Sunday while on duty on the city’s west side, the department said.

media:content.media:text: chicago police patch logo

item.title: 5 Chicago police officers struck by a car while dispersing a crowd

item.dc:creator: Megan Lebowitz
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., warned on “Meet the Press” that the Republican Party will be “very vulnerable” during the midterm elections.

media:content.media:text: Thomas Massie seated on the set of Meet the Press
media:content.media:description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., on NBC News' "Meet the Press" on May 24, 2026.

item.title: Rep. Thomas Massie warns GOP will be ‘very vulnerable’ in the midterms

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: Regional concern over the Ebola outbreak intensified as Uganda confirmed three new cases, while neighboring countries stepped up monitoring measures amid fears of cross-border spread.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Ugandan health teams screen travelers entering the country for Ebola as precautions has been stepped up at the Mpondwe Border Crossing on the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) on May 23.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Health teams at the Mpondwe crossing on the border with Congo on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: DRCONGO-HEALTH-VIRUS-EBOLA
media:content.media:description: Health workers wearing protective equipment disinfect the isolation area for Ebola patients Saturday at the General Referral Hospital of Mongbwalu, Congo.

item.title: DR Congo’s neighbors impose Covid-style measures in push to limit Ebola’s spread

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
item.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

media:content.media:text: Two hands reach out, in the style of "The Creation of Adam," against a blue sky. A glowing green computer chip hovers between the fingers.

item.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder

media:content.media:text: A blurred photo of a race car passing on the track.
media:content.media:description: Race winner Kimi Antonelli of Italy celebrates following the F1 Grand Prix of Canada in Montreal on Sunday.

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins fourth Formula 1 race in a row after George Russell’s car issues

media:content.media:text: A drone photo of an industrial yard surrounded by train tracks.
media:content.media:description: A spokesperson said Sunday the company is monitoring the condition of the “affected material” and crews are working “around the clock to mitigate the risk of a leak.”

media:content.media:text: Two red fire trucks parked in the middle of a street.
